Work through the chapters in order. Each lesson ends with a small challenge. Your progress is saved on this browser.

Beginner0/3 complete
  • 1

    Getting Started with Linux

    What Linux is, the shell, and your first commands.

  • 2

    Filesystem Navigation

    Move around the filesystem with `pwd`, `ls`, and `cd`.

  • 3

    Creating and Manipulating Files

    touch, mkdir, cp, mv, rm - the core file operations.

Intermediate0/2 complete
  • 4

    Users and Permissions

    Understand users, groups, and the chmod / chown commands.

  • 5

    Processes and the System

    ps, top, kill, and how to find what is running.

Built for learning Linux · open source · no signup, no tracking
